Package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.recipe

Class Recipe

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.recipe.Recipe
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.kyori.adventure.key.Keyed, Keyed
Direct Known Subclasses:
FurnaceRecipe
public abstract class Recipe extends Object implements Keyed
Represents base class for recipes
